content.full_text:
Fern PoLrrrcAL PnecrrcEs CouMrssroN
428 J Street . Suite 620. Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660. Fax (916) 322-0886
August 20,2003
Marilynne Mellander
7010 Monte Verde Road
El Sobrante, CA 94803
Re
Your Request for Advice
Our FiIe No. ,4.-03-181
Dear Ms. Mellander:
This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the campaign
provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").I
QUESTION
Are you required to complete the Form 470 for your position as a member of the
El Sobrante Municipal Advisory Council?
CONCLUSION
Because your position is unsalaried, you need not file the Form 470 for any
six-month period in which you have not made or received any contributions or made any
expenditures.
FACTS
You are a member of the El Sobrante Municipal Advisory Council (MAC). you
were a candidate for the MAC position when the election was set forNovember of 2002.
However, the election was cancelled and you were subsequently appointed to the position
of board member. In a telephone conversation, you confirmed that the board member
position is unsalaried. You also confirmed that you curently have no open committee.
I Govemment Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections
18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.


FileNo. A-03-181
Page No. 2
ANALYSIS
The Act requires candidates and officeholders to file periodic campaign
statements disclosing contributions2 received and expendituies3 made in connection with
state and local elections. (Section 84100, et seq.) These statements are filed at specified
times and places depending on the location and activities of the particular candidate or
committee. (Sections 84200-84215.) Section 84200 requires eaih candidate and elected
officer, a term which includes a "person appointed to fill avacantelective office,,
(section 82020), to file semi-annual campaign statements each year no later than July 31
for the period ending June 30, and no later than January 31 for ihe period ending
December 31. (Section84200(a).) An officeholder who receives less than $1,000 in
contributions and who makes less than $1,000 in expenditures during a calendar year
may, however, file one short form campaign statement, Form 470, fir that year
(regulation 18406) essentially declaring that he or she will raise and spend iess than
$1,000 during the calendar year.
As an appointed board member to an office that is generally filled by election,
you are an elected officer. However, elected officers whose salaries are less than $200 a
month are not required to file semi-annual statements during any six-month period in
which they do not make or receive any contributions or make any expendituies. (Section
8 200(a)(2).) Yourposition as a MAC board member is unsalaried. Thus, if you meet
the second prong of the exception by neither receiving contributions nor making
expenditures, you will not be required to complete the Form 470 forthis calendar year.
If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916)
322-s660.
Sincerely,
Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

2 A contribution is defined in section 82015, in part, as: ". . . a pa5rment, a forgiveness of a loan, a
payment of a loan by a third party, or an enforceable promise to make a payment except to the extent that
full and adequate consideration is received, unless it is clear from the surrounding circumstances that it is
not made for political purposes."
' A, expenditure is defined in section 82025 as any payment made for political purposes. Under
regulation 18225 , a payment is made for political purpose when it is "[m]ade by: [a] candidaL, unless it is
clear from surrounding circumstances that the payment was made for iersonal i.r.po.", unrelated to his or
her candidacy. . . ;' (Regulation 15225(a)(2)(A.)

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Are you required to complete the Form 470 for your position as a member of the
El Sobrante Municipal Advisory Council?

CONCLUSION: Because your position is unsalaried, you need not file the Form 470 for any
six-month period in which you have not made or received any contributions or made any
expenditures.
